properties.title: Antwerp
properties.description: Jan Brueghel the Younger was born in Antwerp in 1601. He eventually took over his fathers studio there and spent his later life here.

properties.title: Genoa
properties.description: Jan Brueghel went to Genoa where he stayed with his cousins, the Antwerp painters and art dealers Lucas de Wael and Cornelis de Wael.

properties.title: Milan
properties.description: Jan Brueghel the Younger traveled around 1622 to Milan where he was welcomed by Cardinal Federico Borromeo.
